context_for_next_testing_agent: Gamma/ZGL scoring fix fully tested. The bug was that the old code compared with non-existent strings ('STRONG_BULLISH', 'BULLISH') that were never produced by get_gamma_exposure(). Fixed to use real fields: sentiment (POSITIVE/NEGATIVE) and zgl_signal (ABOVE_ZGL/BELOW_ZGL/NEUTRAL). Scoring: POSITIVE+ABOVE_ZGL=3pts, POSITIVE+other=2pts, any+ABOVE_ZGL=1pt, NEGATIVE+not-ABOVE=0pts. Market is closed (weekend) so data is simulated. SignalStack orders are MOCKED in paper mode.

feature_verification.gamma_scoring_fix: Working - uses sentiment and zgl_signal correctly
